Generates and cleans unit test files for the libm library using a build script.

# Purpose
This script is a Bash script that automates the process of building and cleaning unit tests for a software project. It first invokes the `make` command in the `tools/unit-tests` directory to build the unit tests. After building, it generates a test library file named `test-libm.inc.h` by executing the `gen-test-libm` script located in the `tools/unit-tests` directory. Finally, the script cleans up the build artifacts by running the `make clean` command in the same directory. The script includes a copyright notice and licensing information under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
